name: Tetes De Violon a L'ail (Garlic-flavoured Fiddleheads)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the fiddleheads by shaking them in a paper bag until the brown skins slip off; remove and discard the skins.
2. Steam fresh or frozen (unthawed) fiddleheads until just tender.
3. In a heavy frying pan, heat butter over medium heat. Add garlic and shallots, sautéing until softened.
4. Stir in soy sauce, sugar, and white wine; cook for 1 minute to combine the sauces.
5. Add the steamed fiddleheads to the pan, stirring gently to coat them evenly with the sauce.
6. Serve immediately.
SERVES: 4
